"happy walrus")

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [ ] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [ ] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [ ] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do?

## How to test the changes?
(Select all options that apply)
- ~~I've included appropriate [automated tests](https://docs.galaxyproject.org/en/latest/dev/writing_tests.html).~~
- [x] This is a refactoring of components with existing test coverage.

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)

- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [ ] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [ ] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [ ] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do?

"happy walrus")

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [ ] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [ ] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [ ] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do?

## How to test the changes?
(Select all options that apply)
- ~~I've included appropriate [automated tests](https://docs.galaxyproject.org/en/latest/dev/writing_tests.html).~~
- [x] This is a refactoring of components with existing test coverage.

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [ ] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [ ] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [ ] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do?

"happy walrus")

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [ ] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [ ] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [ ] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do?

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [ ] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [ ] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [ ] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do?

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [ ] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [ ] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [ ] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do?

> **Summary**
> 
> As of now, Bleach is deprecated.
> 
> We will continue to support Bleach:
> 
>    1. security updates
>
>    2. support for new Python versions
> 
>    3. fixes for egregious bugs
> 
> 
> I figure that's one release a year or something like that.
> 
> **Why?**
> 
> Bleach sits on top of--and heavily relies on--html5lib which is no longer in active development. 

[@nsoranzo wrote](https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/16954#issuecomment-1789342935)
> It looks like that https://github.com/messense/nh3 can be used, but it's not urgent, I think.

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [x] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [x] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [x] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do? → https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/17073

- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [x] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [x] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [x] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do? → https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/17073

## How to test the changes?
(Select all options that apply)
- ~~I've included appropriate [automated tests](https://docs.galaxyproject.org/en/latest/dev/writing_tests.html).~~
- [x] This is a refactoring of components with existing test coverage.

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [x] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [x] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [x] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do? → https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/17073

## How to test the changes?
(Select all options that apply)
- ~~I've included appropriate [automated tests](https://docs.galaxyproject.org/en/latest/dev/writing_tests.html).~~
- [x] This is a refactoring of components with existing test coverage.

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [x] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [x] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [x] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do? → https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/17073

## How to test the changes?
(Select all options that apply)
- ~~I've included appropriate [automated tests](https://docs.galaxyproject.org/en/latest/dev/writing_tests.html).~~
- [x] This is a refactoring of components with existing test coverage.

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [x] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [x] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [x] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do? → https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/17073

"happy walrus")

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.39.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.0](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [x] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [x] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [x] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do? → https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/17073

## How to test the changes?
(Select all options that apply)

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.5](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.3](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.1](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.6](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.4](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.2](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.40.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.1](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [x] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [x] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [x] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do? → https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/17073

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.6](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.4](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.2](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.40.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.1](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [x] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [x] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [x] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do? → https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/17073

Fixes: https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/16394

## Major or minor packages bumps now that Python 3.8 is the minimum
- a2wsgi [1.7.0 → 1.8.0](https://github.com/abersheeran/a2wsgi/compare/v1.7.0...v1.8.0)
- bleach [6.0.0 → 6.1.0](https://bleach.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changes.html)
- celery [5.2.7 → 5.3.6](https://github.com/celery/celery/blob/main/Changelog.rst)
- cwltool [3.1.20221109155812 → 3.1.20231114134824](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltool/releases)
  - job loading: allow inputs named `id`
  - Fixed race condition which happens when a job runs "too fast"
  - Properly locate podman images 
  - Python 3.12 support
  - required outputs with `secondaryFiles` fix for containers
  - pass through `QEMU_LD_PREFIX` by default
  - Ensure that files with identical basenames get staged to unique paths
  - always print floats on the command line with decimal notation
  - CWL expressions in `ResourceRequirement` fields can return floats in CWL v1.2+
  - support podman even when not installed as "docker" alias
- dnspython [2.3.0 → 2.4.2](https://dnspython.readthedocs.io/en/latest/whatsnew.html)
- h5py [3.8.0 → 3.10.0](https://docs.h5py.org/en/stable/whatsnew/index.html)
- importlib-resources [5.12.0 → 6.1.1 (backports from Python 3.13)](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources/blob/main/NEWS.rst) [see also](https://github.com/python/importlib_resources#compatibility)
- kombu [5.2.4 → 5.3.4](https://docs.celeryq.dev/projects/kombu/en/stable/changelog.html)
- markdown [3.4.4 → 3.5.1](https://python-markdown.github.io/changelog/#35-2023-10-06)
- numpy [1.21.6 → 1.24.4+](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/release/1.22.0-notes.html)
- pyparsing [3.0.9 → 3.1.1](https://github.com/pyparsing/pyparsing/blob/master/CHANGES)
- tifffile [2021.11.2 → 2023.7.10](https://github.com/cgohlke/tifffile/blob/master/CHANGES.rst)
- uvicorn [0.22.0 → 0.24.0.post1](https://github.com/encode/uvicorn/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- uvloop [0.18.0 → 0.19.0](https://github.com/MagicStack/uvloop/releases)
### Lint
- flake8 [5.0.4 → 6.1.0 (Improve multiprocessing performance)](https://flake8.pycqa.org/en/latest/release-notes/index.html)
- pycodestyle [2.9.1 → 2.11.1](https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/en/latest/developer.html#changes)
- pyflakes [2.5.0 → 3.1.0](https://github.com/PyCQA/pyflakes/blob/main/NEWS.rst)
### Dev
- black [23.3.0 → 23.11.0](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/CHANGES.md#23110)
- cwltest [2.3.20230825125225 → 2.4.20231031143732 (favor "path" over "location" when testing, for @mvdbeek )](https://github.com/common-workflow-language/cwltest/releases)
- httpx [0.24.1 → 0.25.2](https://github.com/encode/httpx/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- myst-parser [1.0.0 → 2.0.0](https://myst-parser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/develop/_changelog.html)
- playwright [1.35.0 → 1.40.0](https://playwright.dev/python/docs/release-notes)
- pytest-html [3.2.0 → 4.1.1](https://pytest-html.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html)
- pytest-postgresql [4.1.1 → 5.0.0 (Support Python 3.11)](https://github.com/ClearcodeHQ/pytest-postgresql/blob/main/CHANGES.rst)
- selenium [4.11.2 → 4.15.2](https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/blob/trunk/py/CHANGES)
- sphinx [5.3.0 → 7.1.2](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/changes.html)
### Typecheck
- mypy [1.4.1 → 1.7.1](https://github.com/python/mypy/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#mypy-17) :partying_face: 

If any of the above release have desired features, we should document their new minimum versions (which will also speed up future `poetry` runs).

- [x] Can importlib-resources be removed?
- [x] Can importlib-metadata be removed?
- [x] [Bleach is deprecated since 2023-01-23](https://github.com/mozilla/bleach/issues/698) What to do? → https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/17073

## How to test the changes?
(Select all options that apply)
- ~~I've included appropriate [automated tests](https://docs.galaxyproject.org/en/latest/dev/writing_tests.html).~~
- [x] This is a refactoring of components with existing test coverage.

This repository is very active, so if you need help with a PR, please let the
right people know. There are language-specific teams for reviewing recipes.

| Language        | Name of review team           |
| --------------- | ----------------------------- |
| python          | `@conda-forge/help-python`    |
| python/c hybrid | `@conda-forge/help-python-c`  |
| r               | `@conda-forge/help-r`         |
| java            | `@conda-forge/help-java`      |
| nodejs          | `@conda-forge/help-nodejs`    |
| c/c++           | `@conda-forge/help-c-cpp`     |
| perl            | `@conda-forge/help-perl`      |
| Julia           | `@conda-forge/help-julia`     |
| ruby            | `@conda-forge/help-ruby`      |
| other           | `@conda-forge/staged-recipes` |

Once the PR is ready for review, please mention one of the teams above in a
new comment. i.e. `@conda-forge/help-some-language, ready for review!`
Then, a bot will label the PR as 'review-requested'.

Due to GitHub limitations, first time contributors to conda-forge are unable
to ping conda-forge teams directly, but you can [ask a bot to ping the team][1]
using a special command in a comment on the PR to get the attention of the
`staged-recipes` team. You can also consider asking on our [Gitter channel][2]
if your recipe isn't reviewed promptly.

[1]: https://conda-forge.org/docs/maintainer/infrastructure.html#conda-forge-admin-please-ping-team
[2]: https://gitter.im/conda-forge/conda-forge.github.io
-->

Thank you very much for putting in this recipe PR!

This repository is very active, so if you need help with a PR, please let the
right people know. There are language-specific teams for reviewing recipes.

| Language        | Name of review team           |
| --------------- | ----------------------------- |
| python          | `@conda-forge/help-python`    |
| python/c hybrid | `@conda-forge/help-python-c`  |
| r               | `@conda-forge/help-r`         |
| java            | `@conda-forge/help-java`      |
| nodejs          | `@conda-forge/help-nodejs`    |
| c/c++           | `@conda-forge/help-c-cpp`     |
| perl            | `@conda-forge/help-perl`      |
| Julia           | `@conda-forge/help-julia`     |
| ruby            | `@conda-forge/help-ruby`      |
| other           | `@conda-forge/staged-recipes` |

Once the PR is ready for review, please mention one of the teams above in a
new comment. i.e. `@conda-forge/help-some-language, ready for review!`
Then, a bot will label the PR as 'review-requested'.

Due to GitHub limitations, first time contributors to conda-forge are unable
to ping conda-forge teams directly, but you can [ask a bot to ping the team][1]
using a special command in a comment on the PR to get the attention of the
`staged-recipes` team. You can also consider asking on our [Gitter channel][2]
if your recipe isn't reviewed promptly.

[1]: https://conda-forge.org/docs/maintainer/infrastructure.html#conda-forge-admin-please-ping-team
[2]: https://gitter.im/conda-forge/conda-forge.github.io
-->

Checklist
- [x] Title of this PR is meaningful: e.g. "Adding my_nifty_package", not "updated meta.yaml".
- [x] License file is packaged (see [here](https://github.com/conda-forge/staged-recipes/blob/5eddbd7fc9d1502169089da06c3688d9759be978/recipes/example/meta.yaml#L64-L73) for an example).
- [x] Source is from official source.
- [x] Package does not vendor other packages. (If a package uses the source of another package, they should be separate packages or the licenses of all packages need to be packaged).
- ~~If static libraries are linked in, the license of the static library is packaged.~~
- [x] Package does not ship static libraries. If static libraries are needed, [follow CFEP-18](https://github.com/conda-forge/cfep/blob/main/cfep-18.md).
- [x] Build number is 0.
- [x] A tarball (`url`) rather than a repo (e.g. `git_url`) is used in your recipe (see [here](https://conda-forge.org/docs/maintainer/adding_pkgs.html#build-from-tarballs-not-repos) for more details).
- [x] GitHub users listed in the maintainer section have posted a comment confirming they are willing to be listed there.
- [x] When in trouble, please check our [knowledge base documentation](https://conda-forge.org/docs/maintainer/knowledge_base.html) before pinging a team.
